tasks.title: Create Gemini TTS script
tasks.description: Build scripts/gemini-tts.sh — takes text input, calls Gemini 2.5 Flash TTS API, returns OGG audio file compatible with Telegram sendVoice. Handle base64 decoding, ffmpeg conversion, error handling.
acceptance: Script accepts text and output path as args
Calls Gemini TTS API with speech config
Outputs OGG file playable by Telegram
Handles API errors gracefully with stderr
Falls back to text-only if TTS fails

tasks.title: Create voice session manager script
tasks.description: Build scripts/voice-session-manager.sh — manages voice brainstorm session state as JSON files in /tmp/voice-sessions/. Commands: start, add-exchange, get-state, end, list, cleanup.
acceptance: start creates new session JSON with unique ID
end finalizes session and generates transcript

tasks.title: Upgrade voice-brainstorm skill with TTS + session state
tasks.description: Update ~/.claude/skills/voice-brainstorm/SKILL.md to: (1) use session manager for state persistence across voice notes, (2) generate TTS voice responses via gemini-tts.sh and send as Telegram voice notes, (3) track which brainstorm questions are answered, (4) detect ship-it triggers.
acceptance: Voice note triggers transcription then Claude response then TTS voice note back
Session state persists across multiple voice exchanges
Questions tracking shows progress through brainstorm
Ship-it detection triggers session end flow
Graceful fallback to text-only if TTS fails

tasks.title: Create voice-to-SDLC pipeline script
tasks.description: Build scripts/voice-to-sdlc.sh — takes a completed voice session, cleans the transcript, generates a feature brief using brainstorm template, saves to docs/{feature}/brief.md, and optionally triggers /auto-dev.
acceptance: Accepts session ID or transcript path as input
Cleans transcript: removes filler, structures into sections
Prompts for confirmation before triggering auto-dev

tasks.title: Add transcript storage and formatting
tasks.description: Extend session manager end command to save completed voice sessions to docs/voice-sessions/YYYY-MM-DD-{topic}.md with timestamps, speaker labels, key decisions, and action items.
acceptance: Format includes timestamps and speaker labels
Key decisions and action items extracted
Links to generated brief if SDLC was triggered

tasks.title: Wire ship-it trigger into voice-brainstorm
tasks.description: When user says ship it, build this, done during a voice session: end session, save transcript, run voice-to-sdlc.sh, show brief, on confirm trigger /auto-dev.
acceptance: Session ends and transcript is saved
Brief generated and shown to user
Works via Telegram voice and text commands

tasks.title: Scaffold voice web app with Next.js
tasks.description: Create apps/voice-app/ with Next.js 15, TypeScript, Tailwind. Set up project structure per design doc. Include .env.example with all required API keys.
acceptance: Next.js 15 app scaffolded with TypeScript and Tailwind

tasks.title: Implement Deepgram streaming STT client
tasks.description: Build apps/voice-app/src/lib/deepgram-stt.ts — WebSocket client for Deepgram Nova-2 streaming speech-to-text.
acceptance: Streams audio chunks and receives transcriptions

tasks.title: Implement Cartesia streaming TTS client
tasks.description: Build apps/voice-app/src/lib/cartesia-tts.ts — streaming TTS client for Cartesia Sonic with low-latency audio playback.
acceptance: Streams text and receives audio chunks
Audio playback starts before full response
Clean TypeScript API with event emitters

tasks.title: Implement Claude API streaming wrapper
tasks.description: Build apps/voice-app/src/lib/claude-stream.ts — streaming Claude API client for voice conversation with brainstorming system prompt.
acceptance: Emits partial text for live transcript

tasks.title: Build Pipecat voice agent (Python)
tasks.description: Create apps/voice-app/agent/voice-agent.py — Pipecat pipeline: Silero VAD, Deepgram STT, Claude LLM, Cartesia TTS. Runs as server process.
acceptance: Pipecat pipeline: VAD then STT then LLM then TTS
Silero VAD detects speech start and end
Handles interruptions when user speaks during Claude response

tasks.title: Build VoiceSession and TranscriptSidebar components
tasks.description: Create main voice conversation UI: VoiceSession.tsx, TranscriptSidebar.tsx, AudioVisualizer.tsx, SessionControls.tsx.
acceptance: VoiceSession shows mic status, timer, exchange count
SessionControls: Start, Pause, Stop, End and Build buttons
Accessible: keyboard navigation, screen reader labels

tasks.title: Build session management and SDLC trigger API
tasks.description: Create server API routes: session CRUD and SDLC trigger endpoint. File-based JSON session store.
acceptance: Session store persists to JSON files

tasks.title: Wire full voice pipeline end-to-end (web app)
tasks.description: Connect all web app components: browser mic to Pipecat agent to Claude to TTS to browser speaker. Live transcript updates, session state sync, End and Build triggers SDLC.
acceptance: Full voice conversation loop works in browser
End and Build button saves transcript and triggers SDLC
Audio quality is clear and natural

tasks.title: Build session history browser
tasks.description: SessionHistory.tsx component and /sessions page listing all past voice sessions with search, filter, view transcript, and re-trigger SDLC.
acceptance: Lists all past sessions with date, topic, duration
View full transcript of any session

tasks.title: Unify session format across Telegram and web
tasks.description: Ensure both Telegram and web app voice sessions use identical JSON format and transcript output. Both write to docs/voice-sessions/.
acceptance: Telegram and web sessions use same JSON schema
SDLC pipeline works with either source

tasks.title: Add error handling and graceful degradation
tasks.description: Harden both approaches: retry failed API calls, fallback TTS to text, fallback Whisper if Deepgram fails, handle WebSocket disconnects, session recovery.
acceptance: Failed TTS falls back to text response
Failed STT retries once then reports error

tasks.title: Write tests for all scripts and components
tasks.description: Test suite: gemini-tts.sh, voice-session-manager.sh, voice-to-sdlc.sh, web app components, API routes.
acceptance: Shell script tests use bash assertions
React components tested with Testing Library
API routes tested with integration tests

tasks.title: Write documentation
tasks.description: Create docs/voice-conversation-system/README.md and apps/voice-app/README.md covering setup, usage, API keys, troubleshooting.

tasks.title: Create /voice-chat unified entry point skill
tasks.description: New /voice-chat skill that detects context (Telegram vs terminal) and routes to the appropriate voice approach.
acceptance: Terminal: opens web app URL or provides instructions
